title: Login form does not display error message when wrong password is entered
summary: Submitting a valid email with an incorrect password does not show the expected 'Invalid email or password.
description: When a user enters a correct email (test@demo. com) combined with a wrong password, the application fails to display the 'Invalid email or password. ' failure message.
expected_result: The error message 'Invalid email or password.' should be visible on the page.
actual_result: No error message is displayed after submitting invalid credentials; the element 'Invalid email or password.' is not found in the DOM.
